title: brachypodium sylvaticum var. involutum
intro: Brachypodium sylvaticum var. involutum, also known as the woodland false brome, is a type of grass native to the mountainous regions of Europe and Asia. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been shown to have potential in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Brachypodium sylvaticum var. involutum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory problems, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made by infusing the leaves and stems in hot water or as a tincture, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human consumption.
